message:
Refactor styles.css to use design tokens

Replace hardcoded spacing, color, and shadow values with --tnz-*
design system tokens for consistent styling. Convert TQL syntax
highlighting colors to use dedicated tokens, update button padding
and margins, and standardize TOC spacing across desktop and mobile.
